turns.question: So, how old are you now, if you don't mind me asking?
turns.questionKo: 그런데, 실례가 안 된다면 지금 나이가 어떻게 되세요?

turns.question: How old were you when you moved to this city?
turns.questionKo: 이 도시로 이사 왔을 때 몇 살이었어요?
turns.answer: I was about nineteen when I moved here.
turns.answerKo: 여기로 이사 왔을 때 열아홉 살 정도였어요.

turns.question: That's young to be on your own. How old were you when you got your first job?
turns.questionKo: 혼자 살기엔 어린 나이네요. 첫 직장 다녔을 때는 몇 살이었어요?
turns.answer: I was sixteen, working at a grocery store back home.

turns.question: How old were you when you learned to drive?
turns.answer: I was seventeen when I finally got my license.
turns.answerKo: 드디어 면허 땄을 때 열일곱 살이었어요.

turns.question: And how old were you when you first traveled abroad?
turns.questionKo: 그리고 처음 해외여행 갔을 때는 몇 살이었어요?
turns.answer: I was twenty-one on my very first trip overseas.
turns.answerKo: 첫 해외여행 갔을 때 스물한 살이었어요.

turns.question: That's a nice string of milestones. What was your first trip like?
turns.questionKo: 인생의 이정표들이 쭉 이어지네요. 첫 여행은 어땠어요?
turns.answer: It was amazing, honestly, that's actually what got me into traveling.
turns.answerKo: 정말 좋았어요, 솔직히 그게 계기가 돼서 여행을 좋아하게 됐어요.

turns.question: How old is your daughter now? Last I remember she was tiny.
turns.questionKo: 따님 지금 몇 살이에요? 제 기억으론 아직 어렸는데요.
turns.answer: She just turned five last month.

turns.question: Wow, time flies. How old was she when she started school?
turns.questionKo: 와, 시간 진짜 빠르네요. 학교 들어갔을 때 몇 살이었어요?
turns.answer: She was about four when she started preschool.
turns.answerKo: 유치원 들어갔을 때 네 살 정도였어요.

turns.question: And how old is your son, is he older or younger than her?
turns.questionKo: 그리고 아드님은 몇 살이에요, 따님보다 형이에요 동생이에요?
turns.answer: He's older, he just turned eight last month.

turns.question: So there's about a three-year gap between them?
turns.questionKo: 그럼 둘이 세 살 정도 차이 나는 거네요?
turns.answer: Yeah, exactly three years, keeps things interesting at home.
turns.answerKo: 네, 정확히 세 살 차이예요, 집에서 심심할 틈이 없어요.

turns.question: How old were you when you had your first, if you don't mind me asking?
turns.questionKo: 실례가 안 된다면, 첫째 낳으셨을 때 몇 살이었어요?
turns.answer: I was twenty-nine when I had him.

turns.question: That's a good age to start. Do you think you'll have more?
turns.questionKo: 시작하기 딱 좋은 나이네요. 더 낳으실 생각 있으세요?
turns.answer: Maybe one more someday, but we're happy with two for now.
turns.answerKo: 언젠가 하나 더 생각은 있는데, 지금은 둘이서 만족해요.

turns.question: How old is your grandmother these days?
turns.answer: She's eighty-two this year, still going strong.

turns.question: That's wonderful. How old was she when she got married?
turns.questionKo: 정말 대단하시네요. 결혼하셨을 때 몇 살이셨어요?
turns.answer: She was twenty-four when she got married, believe it or not.
turns.answerKo: 믿기 힘드시겠지만 결혼하셨을 때 스물네 살이셨어요.

turns.question: And how old was your grandfather at the time?
turns.answer: He was a couple years older, twenty-six I think.
turns.answerKo: 몇 살 더 많으셨어요, 스물여섯 살 정도였던 것 같아요.

turns.question: How old is he turning this year, is he still with us?
turns.questionKo: 올해 몇 살 되시나요, 지금도 계세요?
turns.answer: He would be turning ninety this year, but he passed a while back.
turns.answerKo: 올해 아흔 되셨을 텐데, 얼마 전에 돌아가셨어요.

turns.question: I'm sorry to hear that. How old were you when that happened?
turns.answer: I was about thirteen, so I still remember him pretty well.
turns.answerKo: 열세 살 정도였어서, 아직 할아버지가 꽤 잘 기억나요.

turns.question: That's a special thing to hold onto, those memories.
turns.questionKo: 그런 기억을 간직하고 계신 게 참 특별하네요.
turns.answer: It really is, I think about him more as I get older myself.
turns.answerKo: 정말 그래요, 저도 나이 들수록 할아버지 생각을 더 하게 돼요.
